name: US Cash Advance
description_short: 861 S High St, Columbus, OH: US Cash Advance provides same-day payday and title loans with quick approval.
description_long:
The US Cash Advance location in Columbus, OH is situated at 861 S High St unit E, conveniently positioned along South High Street in central Columbus. This standalone storefront serves the local community with extended hours: Monday through Friday from 8AM to 9PM, and Saturday and Sunday from 10AM to 7PM, making it accessible for working Columbusites who need evening or weekend service.

At this Columbus, OH location, the team specializes in fast payday loans and title loans—short-term financing options for qualified borrowers facing immediate cash needs. Same-day funding is available for approved applications submitted during business hours. For specific questions about rates, required documentation, or loan eligibility, call the Columbus storefront directly at 380-207-1999.

Columbus residents should bring a government-issued ID, proof of income, and a valid checking account when visiting 861 S High St. US Cash Advance serves as a quick financial bridge during unexpected expenses—whether covering emergency repairs, medical bills, or other urgent costs. The location's long hours mean you can stop by before or after work.
address: 861 S High St unit E, Columbus, OH 43206

company_info.headquarters: 861 S High St unit E, Columbus, OH 43206

pros: Same-day or next-day funding reported within 2 hours based on customer reviews
Accepts all credit types including bad credit with no credit checks required
No collateral required; offers unsecured loans up to $50,000
In-person service with staff who provide transparent explanations of terms and fees
Fast approval process reported at 45 minutes to 2 hours in-person
Money can be used for any purpose without restrictions
cons: Website does not disclose APR, interest rates, or actual fee structure—critical terms are missing or incomplete
Payday loan model typically carries triple-digit APR rates (300-400%+) despite customer mention of 'low-interest'
Third-party lender model creates opacity about actual creditor identity and terms at signing
Limited facility amenities with cramped waiting area noted in customer review
Inconsistent website content (references to 'Express Payday Loans' in reviews suggests content quality issues)
best_for: Consumers with bad credit or no credit history needing emergency cash within 24 hours
Borrowers in Detroit who prefer in-person service and staff guidance through the loan process
People facing immediate medical bills, unexpected expenses, or cash flow gaps before payday
diagnosis: US Cash Advance is best for borrowers with poor credit facing immediate financial emergencies who can access the Detroit location and prefer in-person service. Primary caveat: this is a high-cost payday lending model with undisclosed APR/fees on the website, requiring careful review of actual terms before signing—the payday loan category typically carries triple-digit annualized rates and should only be used as a last resort for genuine short-term emergencies.
meta_description: US Cash Advance at 861 S High St, Columbus, OH. Same-day payday and title loans available.
